text:
history, past events and their tracks or records. Attributes include: 
- topic's main Wikimedia portal: "Portal:History"
- Commons category: "History"
- studied by: "historiography",
 "humanities"
- subclass of: "chain of events"
- on focus list of Wikimedia project: "Wikipedia:List of articles all languages should have"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition",
 "Granat Encyclopedic Dictionary"
- facet of: "past"
- has part(s) of the class: "recorded history",
 "oral tradition"
- different from: "histology"
- hashtag: "history"
- maintained by WikiProject: "WikiProject History",
 "WikiProject Time",
 "WikiProject Anthropology"
